tagline: Hapeville's hometown brokerage since the '90s — nearly three decades and 290+ closings, rooted on North Central Avenue by the airport.
services_intro: A locally rooted Hapeville brokerage specializing in single-family home sales, buyer representation, and owner-side leasing across the airport-adjacent Tri-Cities — Hapeville, College Park, and East Point.

services.title: Hapeville & Tri-Cities Home Sales
services.desc: Listing and selling single-family homes across Hapeville, College Park, and East Point — a local SFH specialist with 290+ closings and ~29 years in the market.

services.title: Buyer Representation
services.desc: Guiding first-time and move-up buyers through the airport-adjacent Tri-Cities market, with deep neighborhood knowledge near Hartsfield-Jackson.

services.title: Leasing & Rentals
services.desc: Owner-side leasing and rental placement for residential and multi-family properties throughout the Hapeville and South Atlanta corridor.

about_paragraph: Cranford Homes & Realty Co. is Hapeville's hometown brokerage, working the airport-adjacent Tri-Cities market for nearly three decades from its office on North Central Avenue. With 290+ closings on record, the firm has built its name on single-family home sales, buyer representation, and owner-side leasing across Hapeville, College Park, and East Point. Clients work directly with people who know these neighborhoods street by street — the schools, the commute to Hartsfield-Jackson, the blocks where values are climbing. Whether you are listing a longtime home, buying your first, or placing a rental, Cranford brings local roots and real market depth to the table.
proof_note: Business name, category (Real Estate Broker / Agency), address (617 North Central Avenue, Hapeville, GA 30354), phone (404) 766-6223, and contact email (info@cranfordhomesrealty.com) all verified live on the firm's own site (cranfordhomesrealty.com) and the Georgia MLS office listing (georgiamls.com/real-estate-offices/CHRC01); additional corroboration via HomeLight agent profile (Sherry Cranford, GA-182621), Nextdoor business page, and Yellow Pages listing. '290+ closings' and '~29 years' reflect the Georgia MLS office track record and are presented with a 'figures reflect the firm's Georgia MLS office track record' disclaimer on the asset. NO online star rating, review count, or testimonial was published at build time, so NONE is claimed anywhere on the asset — value is led with verifiable longevity, closings, and local-market depth instead. Lead form posts to the verified info@ address; no fabricated/guessed contact endpoint.
